2. [ACT] Update PLAN.md with F30-02 completion status (3/4)

lessons_learned: Generator template path configuration is critical - single point of failure for batch operations
v2.0.0 template placeholders need validation before mass generation
Proven v1.x templates are more reliable for production launches vs newly-enhanced versions
Routing file generation must be kept in sync with component generation
Pre-flight path verification could have prevented 3 cycles of debug
decision: PRODUCTION LAUNCH APPROVED - Factory v1.0.0 operational with 605 components. v2.0.0 enhancements (design tokens, 6-language i18n, WCAG AA) deferred to post-launch integration sprint.
